reference: I have lower left abdominal and back pain so severe that over-the-counter pain medicine does not help. I experience vomiting and exhaustion and am sleeping abnormally more often. I have regular bowel movements. I am slightly overweight. Please help! Do you have any suggestions about what this could be?
text: I have lower left abdominal and back pain so severe that over-the-counter pain medicine does not help. I experience vomiting and exhaustion, and I'm sleeping at normally more often. I have regular bowel movements. I am slightly overweight. Please help; do you have any suggestions about what this could be?
